debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
A : Set α
hA : A ∈ ↑𝓒
B : Set α
hB : B ∈ ↑𝓒
hAB :
  Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff A (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff B (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
this : symmDiff (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
⊢ A = B

failed_attempts:
Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h (X) (hX : X ∈ 𝓒) : (X ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ A ∈ 𝓒, A := by
    rw [symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hX)]
    exact Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hX) Subset.rfl
  rw [Set.inter_eq_left.2 (h A hA), Set.inter_eq_left.2 (h B hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB
